reviews.comment:
No tienen sistema de facturación ni como pagar con la aplicación ni pueden cargarte los puentos. Los cuales son necesarios para los que somos socios y elegimos Ypf por ese motivo. Deberían solucionar este problema urgente

(Translated by Google)
They don't have a billing system, nor can they pay with the app, and they can't add points to our accounts. These points are essential for those of us who are members and chose YPF for that reason. They should fix this problem urgently.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtajQyeFNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Estacion de servicio ubicada frente terminal de omnibus zona neuralgica de mendoza que complica muchas veces su llagada. Optima atencion, personal muy agradable.

(Translated by Google)
Gas station located opposite the bus terminal in a key area of ​​Mendoza, which often makes getting there difficult. Excellent service, very friendly staff.
